title: Never / Seldom / Usually / Often / Always 頻率句型
titleZh: Never / Seldom / Usually / Often / Always 頻率句型

source.file: Sentence Structure 95 - Never _ Seldom _ Usually _ Often _ Always 頻率句型.pdf

formula: Subject + frequency adverb + main verb + other information

formulas.formula: Subject + frequency adverb + main verb + other information

formulas.labelZh: 配合助動詞或情態動詞
formulas.formula: Subject + first auxiliary or modal + frequency adverb + main verb

exampleZh: 嚴謹的研究者絕不歪曲證據。

examples.zh: 嚴謹的研究者絕不歪曲證據。
清晰的規則通常能減少衝突。

examples.en: Public opinion often changes faster than policy.
examples.zh: 民意往往比政策改變得更快。

examples.en: Strong character always shows under pressure.
examples.zh: 堅強的品格在壓力下總會顯現。

meaning.zh: Never、seldom、often、usually 和 always 按由低至高的頻率，表示事情從不、很少、經常、通常或總是發生。

rules.zh: 頻率副詞放在一般主要動詞之前。
rules.en: Put the frequency adverb before an ordinary main verb.

rules.zh: 頻率副詞放在 be 動詞之後。
rules.en: Put the frequency adverb after the verb be.

rules.zh: 頻率副詞放在第一個助動詞或情態動詞之後。
rules.en: Put the frequency adverb after the first auxiliary or modal verb.
examples: The machine can always detect smoke.

rules.zh: Never 本身已有否定意思，因此不要再加 not。
rules.en: Never is already negative, so do not add not.

rules.zh: Usually 一般表示「大多數情況」；often 表示「很多時候」，但不一定是大多數時候。
rules.en: Usually normally means “in most cases”; often means “many times”, but not necessarily most times.
examples: Often is normally lower in frequency than usually.

benefits.zh: 它能清楚表示頻率，讓讀者立即知道事情是從不、很少、經常、通常還是每次都發生。
benefits.en: It shows frequency clearly, telling the reader whether something happens no times, only rarely, many times, most times or every time.

benefits.zh: 一個頻率副詞便可以代替 in most cases、on many occasions 或 every time 等較長片語。
benefits.en: A single adverb can replace longer expressions such as in most cases, on many occasions or every time.

benefits.zh: 把頻率副詞放在動詞旁邊，能讓讀者容易把「多久一次」和「發生甚麼」連繫起來。
benefits.en: Placing the adverb beside the verb keeps the frequency close to the action.

benefits.zh: Never 和 always 語氣很強；seldom、often 和 usually 則可描述一般規律，而不表示每次都一定如此。
benefits.en: It helps you control how strong your statement sounds.

benefits.zh: 掌握正確位置後，便可以快速描述習慣、日常安排、規則、服務和一般事實。
benefits.en: It gives you a useful speaking and writing frame for habits, routines, rules, services and general facts.

en: Rewrite each sentence using the frequency adverb in brackets.
Keep the original meaning and tense, and place the adverb in the correct position.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用括號內的頻率副詞改寫每句。
保留原意和時態，並把頻率副詞放在正確位置。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Serious researchers do not ever twist evidence. [never]
questions.promptZh: 嚴謹的研究者從來不會歪曲證據。
questions.answer: Serious researchers never twist evidence.
questions.answerZh: 嚴謹的研究者絕不歪曲證據。
questions.highlight: Serious researchers never twist evidence.

questions.prompt: Good opportunities do not often arrive twice. [seldom]
questions.promptZh: 好的機會並不常會來兩次。
questions.answer: Good opportunities seldom arrive twice.
questions.answerZh: 好的機會很少來兩次。
questions.highlight: Good opportunities seldom arrive twice.

questions.prompt: In most cases, clear rules reduce conflict. [usually]
questions.promptZh: 在大多數情況下，清晰的規則能減少衝突。
questions.answer: Clear rules usually reduce conflict.
questions.answerZh: 清晰的規則通常能減少衝突。
questions.highlight: Clear rules usually reduce conflict.

questions.prompt: It is common for public opinion to change faster than policy. [often]
questions.promptZh: 民意比政策改變得更快，是常見的情況。
questions.answer: Public opinion often changes faster than policy.
questions.answerZh: 民意往往比政策改變得更快。
questions.highlight: Public opinion often changes faster than policy.

questions.prompt: Strong character shows under pressure every time. [always]
questions.promptZh: 堅強的品格每次都會在壓力下顯現。
questions.answer: Strong character always shows under pressure.
questions.answerZh: 堅強的品格在壓力下總會顯現。
questions.highlight: Strong character always shows under pressure.

questions.prompt: Mia does not leave wet towels on the bed at all. [never]
questions.promptZh: 米婭完全不會把濕毛巾放在床上。
questions.answer: Mia never leaves wet towels on the bed.
questions.answerZh: 米婭從不把濕毛巾放在床上。
questions.highlight: Mia never leaves wet towels on the bed.

questions.prompt: Ben does not often miss the first bus. [seldom]
questions.promptZh: 本不常錯過第一班巴士。
questions.answer: Ben seldom misses the first bus.
questions.answerZh: 本很少錯過第一班巴士。
questions.highlight: Ben seldom misses the first bus.

questions.prompt: On most days, our class starts with a short review. [usually]
questions.promptZh: 大多數日子，我們的課堂都以簡短溫習開始。
questions.answer: Our class usually starts with a short review.
questions.answerZh: 我們的課堂通常以簡短溫習開始。
questions.highlight: Our class usually starts with a short review.

questions.prompt: It is common for the neighbours to share food during festivals. [often]
questions.promptZh: 鄰居在節日期間分享食物是很常見的。
questions.answer: The neighbours often share food during festivals.
questions.answerZh: 鄰居在節日期間經常分享食物。
questions.highlight: The neighbours often share food during festivals.

questions.prompt: Every night before going to bed, I check that the door is locked. [always]
questions.promptZh: 每天晚上睡覺前，我都會檢查門是否已鎖好。
questions.answer: I always check that the door is locked before going to bed.
questions.answerZh: 我睡覺前總會檢查門是否已鎖好。
questions.highlight: I always check that the door is locked before going to bed.

questions.prompt: Aisha is not late for volunteer work, not even once. [never]
questions.promptZh: 艾莎做義工從未遲到，連一次也沒有。
questions.answer: Aisha is never late for volunteer work.
questions.answerZh: 艾莎做義工從不遲到。
questions.highlight: Aisha is never late for volunteer work.

questions.prompt: The town square is not often crowded on weekdays. [seldom]
questions.promptZh: 市鎮廣場在平日不常擠滿人。
questions.answer: The town square is seldom crowded on weekdays.
questions.answerZh: 市鎮廣場在平日很少擠滿人。
questions.highlight: The town square is seldom crowded on weekdays.

questions.prompt: The library is quiet on most afternoons. [usually]
questions.promptZh: 圖書館在大多數下午都很安靜。
questions.answer: The library is usually quiet in the afternoon.
questions.answerZh: 圖書館在下午通常很安靜。
questions.highlight: The library is usually quiet in the afternoon.

questions.prompt: The sports hall is busy on many evenings. [often]
questions.promptZh: 體育館在很多晚上都很繁忙。
questions.answer: The sports hall is often busy in the evening.
questions.answerZh: 體育館在晚上經常很繁忙。
questions.highlight: The sports hall is often busy in the evening.

questions.prompt: Every time I ask for help, staff members at the customer-service desk are polite. [always]
questions.promptZh: 每次我求助時，顧客服務處的職員都很有禮貌。
questions.answer: Staff members at the customer-service desk are always polite when I ask for help.
questions.answerZh: 每當我求助時，顧客服務處的職員總是很有禮貌。
questions.highlight: Staff members at the customer-service desk are always polite when I ask for help.

questions.prompt: Daniel did not complain once during the whole trip. [never]
questions.promptZh: 丹尼爾在整段旅程中一次也沒有抱怨。
questions.answer: Daniel never complained during the whole trip.
questions.answerZh: 丹尼爾在整段旅程中從未抱怨。
questions.highlight: Daniel never complained during the whole trip.

questions.prompt: Chloe felt nervous only on rare occasions during rehearsals. [seldom]
questions.promptZh: 克洛伊在綵排時只有極少數情況會感到緊張。
questions.answer: Chloe seldom felt nervous during rehearsals.
questions.answerZh: 克洛伊在綵排時很少感到緊張。
questions.highlight: Chloe seldom felt nervous during rehearsals.

questions.prompt: On most school days, the pupils ate lunch in the courtyard. [usually]
questions.promptZh: 在大多數上課日，學生都在庭院吃午餐。
questions.answer: The pupils usually ate lunch in the courtyard on school days.
questions.answerZh: 學生在上課日通常在庭院吃午餐。
questions.highlight: The pupils usually ate lunch in the courtyard on school days.

questions.prompt: Leo repaired old bicycles on many weekends. [often]
questions.promptZh: 里奧在很多個週末都會修理舊單車。
questions.answer: Leo often repaired old bicycles at weekends.
questions.answerZh: 里奧在週末經常修理舊單車。
questions.highlight: Leo often repaired old bicycles at weekends.

questions.prompt: The alarm sounded several times. On every occasion, the nurse checked the patient. [always]
questions.promptZh: 警報響了幾次。每一次，護士都會檢查病人。
questions.answer: The nurse always checked the patient when the alarm sounded.
questions.answerZh: 警報響起時，護士總會檢查病人。
questions.highlight: The nurse always checked the patient when the alarm sounded.

questions.prompt: The app has not lost any of my saved notes at any time. [never]
questions.promptZh: 這個應用程式從來沒有遺失我儲存的任何筆記。
questions.answer: The app has never lost any of my saved notes.
questions.answerZh: 這個應用程式從未遺失我儲存的任何筆記。
questions.highlight: The app has never lost any of my saved notes.

questions.prompt: Our team has had to cancel training only on rare occasions. [seldom]
questions.promptZh: 我們的隊伍只有在極少數情況下才要取消訓練。
questions.answer: Our team has seldom had to cancel training.
questions.answerZh: 我們的隊伍很少需要取消訓練。
questions.highlight: Our team has seldom had to cancel training.

questions.prompt: In most cases, visitors can buy tickets at the entrance. [usually]
questions.promptZh: 在大多數情況下，訪客可以在入口處購票。
questions.answer: Visitors can usually buy tickets at the entrance.
questions.answerZh: 訪客通常可以在入口處購票。
questions.highlight: Visitors can usually buy tickets at the entrance.

questions.prompt: On many occasions, cyclists can use this path safely after dark. [often]
questions.promptZh: 在很多情況下，單車使用者可以在天黑後安全使用這條小徑。
questions.answer: Cyclists can often use this path safely after dark.
questions.answerZh: 單車使用者在天黑後往往仍可安全使用這條小徑。
questions.highlight: Cyclists can often use this path safely after dark.

questions.prompt: Every time you press this button, the screen will show the menu. [always]
questions.promptZh: 每次按下這個按鈕，螢幕都會顯示選單。
questions.answer: The screen will always show the menu when you press this button.
questions.answerZh: 按下這個按鈕時，螢幕總會顯示選單。
questions.highlight: The screen will always show the menu when you press this button.

questions.prompt: The museum has not been closed for repairs at any point this year. [never]
questions.promptZh: 博物館今年從未因維修而關閉。
questions.answer: The museum has never been closed for repairs this year.
questions.answerZh: 博物館今年從未因維修而關閉。
questions.highlight: The museum has never been closed for repairs this year.

questions.prompt: It is rare for buses to be delayed by light rain. [seldom]
questions.promptZh: 巴士很少會因小雨而延誤。
questions.answer: Buses are seldom delayed by light rain.
questions.answerZh: 巴士很少因小雨而延誤。
questions.highlight: Buses are seldom delayed by light rain.

questions.prompt: As a normal practice, meals are prepared with fresh ingredients. [usually]
questions.promptZh: 按照一般做法，膳食會以新鮮食材烹調。
questions.answer: Meals are usually prepared with fresh ingredients.
questions.answerZh: 膳食通常以新鮮食材烹調。
questions.highlight: Meals are usually prepared with fresh ingredients.

questions.prompt: It is common for the community garden to be visited by local families at weekends. [often]
questions.promptZh: 本地家庭在週末到訪社區花園是很常見的。
questions.answer: The community garden is often visited by local families at weekends.
questions.answerZh: 社區花園在週末經常有本地家庭到訪。
questions.highlight: The community garden is often visited by local families at weekends.

questions.prompt: Safety checks must be completed before the machine starts, without exception. [always]
questions.promptZh: 所有安全檢查都必須在機器啟動前完成，沒有例外。
questions.answer: Safety checks must always be completed before the machine starts.
questions.answerZh: 安全檢查一律必須在機器啟動前完成。
questions.highlight: Safety checks must always be completed before the machine starts.

questions.prompt: What does Omar do when he receives an unknown link? He does not open it under any circumstances. [never]
questions.promptZh: 奧馬爾收到不明連結時會怎樣做？他在任何情況下都不會開啟它。
questions.answer: Omar never opens an unknown link when he receives one.
questions.answerZh: 奧馬爾收到不明連結時，從不會開啟它。
questions.highlight: Omar never opens an unknown link when he receives one.

questions.prompt: Even when the shop is busy, customers have to wait more than five minutes only on rare occasions. [seldom]
questions.promptZh: 即使店舖很繁忙，顧客也只有在極少數情況下才要等候超過五分鐘。
questions.answer: Customers seldom have to wait more than five minutes, even when the shop is busy.
questions.answerZh: 即使店舖很繁忙，顧客也很少需要等候超過五分鐘。
questions.highlight: Customers seldom have to wait more than five minutes, even when the shop is busy.

questions.prompt: If the weather is dry, the football club holds its practice outdoors in most cases. [usually]
questions.promptZh: 如果天氣乾爽，足球會大多數時候都在戶外訓練。
questions.answer: If the weather is dry, the football club usually holds its practice outdoors.
questions.answerZh: 如果天氣乾爽，足球會通常在戶外訓練。
questions.highlight: If the weather is dry, the football club usually holds its practice outdoors.

questions.prompt: There are many occasions when the guide reminds visitors not to touch the exhibits. [often]
questions.promptZh: 導遊在很多時候都會提醒訪客不要觸摸展品。
questions.answer: The guide often reminds visitors not to touch the exhibits.
questions.answerZh: 導遊經常提醒訪客不要觸摸展品。
questions.highlight: The guide often reminds visitors not to touch the exhibits.

questions.prompt: Whenever Priya cooks for guests, she checks whether anyone has a food allergy. [always]
questions.promptZh: 每當普莉雅為客人下廚時，她都會查問是否有人對食物過敏。
questions.answer: Priya always checks whether anyone has a food allergy when she cooks for guests.
questions.answerZh: 普莉雅為客人下廚時，總會查問是否有人對食物過敏。
questions.highlight: Priya always checks whether anyone has a food allergy when she cooks for guests.

questions.prompt: The hospital's emergency entrance is not blocked, even during the busiest hours. [never]
questions.promptZh: 即使在最繁忙的時段，醫院的急症入口也不會被堵塞。
questions.answer: The hospital's emergency entrance is never blocked, even during the busiest hours.
questions.answerZh: 即使在最繁忙的時段，醫院的急症入口也從不會被堵塞。
questions.highlight: The hospital's emergency entrance is never blocked, even during the busiest hours.

questions.prompt: Only on rare occasions are reports with serious errors accepted. [seldom]
questions.promptZh: 只有在極少數情況下，含有嚴重錯誤的報告才會獲接納。
questions.answer: Reports with serious errors are seldom accepted.
questions.answerZh: 含有嚴重錯誤的報告很少會獲接納。
questions.highlight: Reports with serious errors are seldom accepted.

questions.prompt: How does Sofia pay for the bus on most days? She uses a travel card. [usually]
questions.promptZh: 蘇菲亞大多數日子怎樣支付巴士車資？她使用交通卡。
questions.answer: Sofia usually uses a travel card to pay for the bus.
questions.answerZh: 蘇菲亞通常使用交通卡支付巴士車資。
questions.highlight: Sofia usually uses a travel card to pay for the bus.

questions.prompt: Teachers frequently ask students who finish early to help check the equipment. [often]
questions.promptZh: 老師經常請提早完成工作的學生協助檢查器材。
questions.answer: Teachers often ask students who finish early to help check the equipment.
questions.answerZh: 老師常常請提早完成工作的學生協助檢查器材。
questions.highlight: Teachers often ask students who finish early to help check the equipment.

questions.prompt: The recycling team follows the same safety steps without exception before collecting broken glass. [always]
questions.promptZh: 回收隊收集碎玻璃前，毫無例外地遵循相同的安全步驟。
questions.answer: The recycling team always follows the same safety steps before collecting broken glass.
questions.answerZh: 回收隊收集碎玻璃前，總會遵循相同的安全步驟。
questions.highlight: The recycling team always follows the same safety steps before collecting broken glass.

questions.prompt: There has not been a single occasion when the bank has shared a customer's password by email. [never]
questions.promptZh: 銀行從來沒有透過電郵分享顧客密碼的情況。
questions.answer: The bank has never shared a customer's password by email.
questions.answerZh: 銀行從未透過電郵分享顧客的密碼。
questions.highlight: The bank has never shared a customer's password by email.

questions.prompt: Does the new timetable commonly cause confusion among passengers? It does so only on rare occasions. [seldom]
questions.promptZh: 新時間表是否經常令乘客感到混亂？這種情況只會在極少數時候發生。
questions.answer: The new timetable seldom causes confusion among passengers.
questions.answerZh: 新時間表很少令乘客感到混亂。
questions.highlight: The new timetable seldom causes confusion among passengers.

questions.prompt: Under the normal arrangement, patients who need the same medicine again collect it from the clinic counter. [usually]
questions.promptZh: 按照一般安排，需要再次領取同一種藥物的病人會在診所櫃位取藥。
questions.answer: Patients who need the same medicine again usually collect it from the clinic counter.
questions.answerZh: 需要再次領取同一種藥物的病人通常在診所櫃位取藥。
questions.highlight: Patients who need the same medicine again usually collect it from the clinic counter.

questions.prompt: The student council meets frequently during each term to discuss students' suggestions. [often]
questions.promptZh: 學生會每個學期都會多次開會，討論學生的建議。
questions.answer: The student council often meets during each term to discuss students' suggestions.
questions.answerZh: 學生會每個學期都經常開會，討論學生的建議。
questions.highlight: The student council often meets during each term to discuss students' suggestions.

questions.prompt: Applicants must provide proof of identity in every case before a library card can be issued. [always]
questions.promptZh: 申請人在任何情況下都必須先提供身分證明，圖書證才可發出。
questions.answer: Applicants must always provide proof of identity before a library card can be issued.
questions.answerZh: 申請人必須一律先提供身分證明，圖書證才可發出。
questions.highlight: Applicants must always provide proof of identity before a library card can be issued.

questions.prompt: The rescue team will not enter an unsafe building under any circumstances before an engineer approves it. [never]
questions.promptZh: 在工程師批准前，救援隊在任何情況下都不會進入不安全的建築物。
questions.answer: The rescue team will never enter an unsafe building before an engineer approves it.
questions.answerZh: 在工程師批准前，救援隊絕不會進入不安全的建築物。
questions.highlight: The rescue team will never enter an unsafe building before an engineer approves it.

questions.prompt: Although heavy rain is common in the town, the new drainage system fails only on rare occasions. [seldom]
questions.promptZh: 雖然這個市鎮經常下大雨，但新的排水系統只有在極少數情況下才會失靈。
questions.answer: Although heavy rain is common in the town, the new drainage system seldom fails.
questions.answerZh: 雖然這個市鎮經常下大雨，但新的排水系統很少失靈。
questions.highlight: Although heavy rain is common in the town, the new drainage system seldom fails.

questions.prompt: When online orders arrive damaged, the company replaces them in most cases without charging the customer. [usually]
questions.promptZh: 網上訂單送達時如有損壞，公司在大多數情況下會免費更換。
questions.answer: When online orders arrive damaged, the company usually replaces them without charging the customer.
questions.answerZh: 網上訂單送達時如有損壞，公司通常會免費更換。
questions.highlight: When online orders arrive damaged, the company usually replaces them without charging the customer.

questions.prompt: How regularly does the library run weekend workshops? It runs them many times during the school year to help parents support reading at home. [often]
questions.promptZh: 圖書館多常舉辦週末工作坊？它在學年期間舉辦很多次，幫助家長在家支援閱讀。
questions.answer: The library often runs weekend workshops during the school year to help parents support reading at home.
questions.answerZh: 圖書館在學年期間經常舉辦週末工作坊，幫助家長在家支援閱讀。
questions.highlight: The library often runs weekend workshops during the school year to help parents support reading at home.

questions.prompt: Whenever a serious complaint is received, the manager records the details and tells the customer what will happen next. [always]
questions.promptZh: 每當收到嚴重投訴時，經理都會記錄詳情，並告訴顧客下一步會怎樣處理。
questions.answer: The manager always records the details and tells the customer what will happen next when a serious complaint is received.
questions.answerZh: 收到嚴重投訴時，經理總會記錄詳情，並告訴顧客下一步會怎樣處理。
questions.highlight: The manager always records the details and tells the customer what will happen next when a serious complaint is received.
